comments.author: @FortuneExplorer1
comments.text: A wonderful blend of adventure, history, and natural beauty. The narration brings every location to life.

comments.author: @jacquelineroberts1133
comments.text: Hey! Thanks for taking us on this journey! 😍Washington State and Montana are actually my very favorite places in the United States. I just love the geography, very beautiful. Can't say the same for the politics though. We left Washington State because the people there were so political we thought they were all crazy. 🙄Well, at least in the Portland-Vancouver metro area where we used to live they were. No, seriously.

comments.author: @user-wu7cb5bn5q
comments.text: Born and raised in a town that was featured near the end of the Video. Lewistown. I miss my home everyday now that I live down south. No place like Montana.

comments.author: @AtlasGlobal_MusicMountains
comments.text: Oh my, another AI narrated video with constantly misused photo and video stock.  Who makes these?  Some troll farm outsourced in Eastern Europe?  Just get the damn geography right please?
